description_long: This is a stylized doll with a pastel color palette, featuring large, butterfly-like wings and a prominent bow on top of its head. The doll has voluminous, wavy, light blonde hair that cascades down its back, partially covering the wings. Its face is expressive, with wide eyes and an open mouth, giving it a cheerful and animated appearance. The doll is dressed in a short-sleeved top with a decorative print, a short skirt, and knee-high socks, all in soft shades of cream, yellow, and pink. The arms are bent at the elbows, with hands raised near the face, suggesting a playful or surprised gesture. The overall design is whimsical and cute, reminiscent of Japanese kawaii or magical girl aesthetics.
description: A pastel-colored, winged doll with a large bow, wavy blonde hair, and a playful, expressive face, dressed in a cute outfit with knee-high socks.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large bow, voluminous hair, and butterfly-like wings fully spread across the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bow, hair volume, and the wing's side contour, with the arm bent and hand raised.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the doll's expressive face, raised hands, detailed top, and symmetrical wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the bow, hair, wing, and bent arm from the opposite profile.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a pastel-themed outfit consisting of a short-sleeved printed top, a short skirt, and knee-high socks, all in soft cream, yellow, and pink tones. The style is reminiscent of Japanese kawaii and magical girl fashion, with whimsical and playful elements.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms bent at the elbows and hands raised near the face, legs together and straight, head facing forward, and torso aligned vertically.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a wide open mouth and large, wide eyes, conveying a cheerful and surprised expression.
attribute_hair_style: Long, wavy, light blonde hair with voluminous curls, styled with a large bow on top.
